returns.publicKeyHash: Hash of the PQC public key

returns.certified: True if keys were generated with QNRG

params.message: Hash of the message that was signed
params.signer: Address of the signer (for HSM lookup)

getValidatorKey(address).notice: Get the public key hash for a validator

isQuantumCertified(address).notice: Check if validator has quantum-certified keys

verifyPQCWithKey(bytes32,bytes,bytes,uin.notice: Verify with explicit public key (for cross-chain proofs)
